summary: Iteration 80 - Sale/Purchase Voucher PDF/Excel Exports and Paddy Stock PV Integration - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified including PDF/Excel export buttons, Dashboard Paddy Stock card showing 'Purchase se kharida' line for Rice (when purchased), items displaying in Qntl format.
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test PV with Paddy 50Q during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF/Excel exports for Sale/Purchase vouchers working correctly with ledger-based Paid/Balance columns and items showing in Qntl. Paddy Stock API returns pv_paddy_in_qntl field. Dashboard shows 'Purchase se kharida' line for Rice when PV purchases exist (currently 5000Q Rice Usna). For Paddy, line shows when pv_paddy_in_qntl > 0.

details: Items show quantities in Qntl format
Has Items (Qntl) column showing quantities in Qntl
Items show quantities in Qntl format
Has Ledger Paid and Balance columns
Returns pv_paddy_in_qntl field for Purchase Voucher paddy
Currently pv_paddy_in_qntl = 0 (no PV with Paddy item)
Creating PV with Paddy 50Q increases pv_paddy_in_qntl by 50
Deleting PV restores original stock value
Shows 'Purchase se kharida: + 5000 Qntl' line in green
Currently shows 5000Q from existing PV with Rice (Usna)
Will appear when PV with Paddy item is created

verification_notes.items_in_qntl: Both Sale and Purchase voucher tables and exports show items as 'ItemName(QtyQ)' format e.g., 'Rice (Usna)(5000Q)', 'Broken(15Q)'
verification_notes.ledger_based_balance: Paid and Balance columns in exports are based on ledger transactions (party_type filter), not just advance payments
verification_notes.pv_paddy_condition: Dashboard shows 'Purchase se kharida' line in Paddy Stock card only when pv_paddy_in_qntl > 0. Currently 0 because no PV has Paddy item.
verification_notes.low_stock_alert_removed: Previous iteration confirmed Low Stock Alert removed from Purchase Vouchers page
